---
id: single-step-from-files
title: "Single step import"
description: "Unlike the /v2/projects/{projectId}/import endpoint, imports the data in single request by provided files and parameters. This is useful for automated importing via API or CLI."
sidebar_label: "Single step import"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Single step import"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/single-step-import"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Unlike the /v2/projects/\{projectId\}/import endpoint, imports the data in single request by provided files and parameters. This is useful for automated importing via API or CLI.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
